---
title: "Quiz 1 — Simple Linear Regression"
---

These questions rehearse the core ideas of **simple linear regression** — reading and
interpreting the fitted line $\hat{y} = b_0 + b_1 x$, computing predictions, the
meaning of the slope and intercept, and the limits of extrapolation. They mirror
**Homework 1** and draw on **Chapter 1** of the Lecture Notes.

Answer each question and press **Check** for instant, explained feedback. Your score
and progress are saved in this browser; press **Reset quiz** to start over.

```{=html}
<div class="quizbank" data-bank="../assets/banks/quiz1.json" data-show-title="false"></div>
<script type="module" src="../assets/quiz-engine.js"></script>
```
